title: mirabilis californica var. retrorsa
intro: Mirabilis californica var. retrorsa, also known as California four o'clock or California desert four o'clock, is a variety of flowering plant in the four o'clock family (Nyctaginaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mirabilis californica var. retrorsa include wound healing, pain relief, and antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of this plant often include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
